title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v1.13.0
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/skopeo.git):

| dist-git branch | error |
| --------------- | ----- |
| `f37` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/2854 |
| `f38` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/2853 |
| `rawhide` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/2852 |


You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body:
